news.headline: Gasoline demand in US dropped to 8.83M bpd in April, hitting its lowest point since February - EIA data.
Keysight partners with SGS to test Skylo NTN devices, using RF/RRM Carrier Acceptance Toolset. Enables secure connectivity.
news.summary: In Santa Rosa, California, Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) has revealed that its RF/RRM Carrier Acceptance Toolset (RCAT) has empowered SGS to oversee the Skylo Technologies non-terrestrial network (NTN) device certification initiative. This move aims to enhance secure and dependable connectivity over a vast area. Furthermore, mobile operators are looking into implementing the hybrid satellite-terrestrial network structure of NTN to expand coverage. This advancement is crucial for chipset and device manufacturers.

news.headline: Oil and petroleum demand in US surged to 20 million bpd in April, marking highest level since December 2023 - EIA.
Investors face uncertainty post-debate. PCE data: Headline 0.0%, Core 0.1%. Personal spending 0.2%, income 0.5%. Key stocks highlighted.
news.summary: The article discusses the current state of the stock market and recent economic data, focusing on the PCE (Personal Consumption Expenditures) data and personal income/spending figures. The stock market is approaching a new high but faces challenges as it is above the support zone with low volume. The PCE data showed headline PCE at 0.0% (as expected) and core PCE at 0.1%, both in line with consensus. However, personal spending dropped to 0.2% and personal income rose to 0.5%, slightly above consensus. The article emphasizes the need for prudent investing amidst uncertainty caused by the recent presidential debate and advises investors to wait for clarity before making portfolio changes. It also suggests potential winners post-debate including the Magnificent Seven stocks, other mega-cap stocks, and fossil fuel energy stocks.

news.headline: S&P Global appoints Martina Cheung as new CEO, succeeding Douglas Peterson, effective Nov 1, 2024. Cheung has been with the company for 14 years and currently heads S&P Global Ratings, generating $3.3 billion in revenue in 2023. Peterson to remain on board until May 2025 and serve as special advisor until Dec 31, 2025.
news.summary: S&P Global Inc. (NYSE:SPGI) announced today that Martina L. Cheung, the current President of S&P Global Ratings, will take over as President and CEO, succeeding Douglas L. Peterson, starting November 1, 2024. Cheung will officially join the Board on July 1, 2024, while Peterson will continue as a Board member until May 2025. Additionally, he will act as a special advisor until December 31, 2025. With 14 years of experience at S&P Global, Cheung currently oversees S&P Global Ratings, which recorded $3.3 billion in revenue in 2023, marking a 9% growth from the previous year. The sector also maintained a solid 56.5% operating profit margin. Furthermore, under Cheung’s guidance, S&P Global Sustainable achieved an impressive 24% revenue increase in 2023. For more details on this news, the complete story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Matrixport introduces its initial private strategy trading contest, providing rewards and benefits to participants. (Details inside)
news.summary: Matrixport has recently kicked off its first-ever private strategy trading competition. The competition is open to participants seeking rewards and exclusive privileges. This event aims to attract traders with varied levels of expertise, with a focus on cultivating a competitive trading environment. Participants will have the opportunity to showcase their skills and potentially earn significant rewards. The competition is set to involve a notable number of traders, with a diverse range of strategies expected to be employed. This initiative by Matrixport is geared towards fostering a dynamic trading community while offering attractive incentives for participants.

news.headline: AI revolution impacting industries, especially creative sector; Scope AI Corp's commentary June 28, 2024.
news.summary: A recent commentary by USA News Group on behalf of Scope AI Corp highlighted the impact of the artificial intelligence (AI) revolution in various industries. Released on June 28, 2024, in Vancouver, BC, the piece discusses the significant changes brought about by AI. The article emphasizes the emergence of new tools and technologies in creative sectors due to AI, resulting in a transformation of job roles and processes. This shift signifies a notable progression within numerous industries as they adapt to the advancements of AI.

news.headline: Gilbert Romo appointed as Chief Revenue Officer at Kane Infrastructure Services to drive growth and add value to clients.
news.summary: Kane Infrastructure Services, a digital infrastructure solutions provider, has named Gilbert Romo as its new chief revenue officer. Romo, with over 30 years of experience in the tech infrastructure sector, will oversee commercial functions at Kane, aiming to boost strategic growth and enhance client value. Prior to this role, Romo served as the executive vice president at IES Communications. This move signifies Kane's commitment to advancing under Romo's leadership towards growth and client satisfaction.

Trump vows to revamp Biden's crypto regulations for America's future at Wisconsin event, aiming to secure crypto innovation domestically.
news.summary: At a campaign event in Wisconsin, former President Donald Trump pledged to dismantle President Joe Biden's regulatory framework for cryptocurrencies, emphasizing his commitment to bringing the future of digital currencies back to the United States. Trump received enthusiastic applause as he stated, "We will ensure that the future of crypto and the future of Bitcoin will be made in America. Otherwise, other countries are going to have it." This announcement comes amidst a push to secure America's future and create opportunities for young people, with Trump specifically targeting Biden's approach towards crypto policies. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Sunarso named Best CEO; BRI wins 11 awards at FinanceAsia Awards 2024 in Hong Kong.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on June 28, 2024, PT. Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (IDX: BBRI) has demonstrated outstanding performance in the global financial sector. The bank was honored with 11 prestigious awards by FinanceAsia during the FinanceAsia Awards and Asia's Best Companies Poll Gala Dinner 2024. This recognition underscores BRI's significant achievements and success in the industry.

news.headline: Global data center construction facing supply chain delays, DPR Construction advises early procurement & flexibility.
news.summary: As competition intensifies for essential components, challenges are expected to persist in the construction industry. DPR Construction advises businesses to proactively align and secure necessary resources early on while maintaining flexibility in their strategies. The ongoing supply chain disruptions are significantly impacting construction projects worldwide, particularly within the data center sector. These delays underscore the importance of proactive planning to mitigate the effects of the current supply chain crisis on the industry.

news.headline: Tiziana Life Sciences receives $3.4M non-dilutive funding for neurodegenerative disease research.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Tiziana Life Sciences, Ltd. (Nasdaq: TLSA) revealed receiving $3.4 million in non-dilutive funding. The company, focused on pioneering treatments for neurodegenerative diseases linked to active neuroinflammatory processes, also shared a corporate update video.

news.headline: Häagen-Dazs® partners with LGBTQIA2+S artists, showcasing their murals nationwide during Pride Month.
news.summary: Häagen-Dazs® is celebrating Pride Month by collaborating with three LGBTQIA2+S artists, showcasing their murals nationwide. The ice cream brand has expanded its partnership by featuring artworks in various locations across the country. The initiative aims to support and promote diversity and inclusion, coinciding with efforts to stand with the LGBTQIA2+S community. The murals will be on display throughout the month, emphasizing the brand's commitment to celebrating individuality and unity.

news.headline: Record number of 70.9 million Americans expected to travel 50+ miles this Fourth of July, surpassing pre-pandemic levels.
news.summary: This Fourth of July holiday, a record-breaking 70.9 million Americans are anticipated to travel 50 miles or more, according to AAA. This number is higher than pre-pandemic levels and reflects a significant increase in travel activity. Additionally, AAA forecasts that out of these travelers, a record 60.6 million individuals will travel by car, underscoring the popularity of road trips during this period.

news.headline: Blackstone Real Estate finishes privatization of AIR Communities for around $10B, acquiring all common shares at $39.12/share.
news.summary: In a joint statement, Blackstone and Apartment Income REIT Corp. (AIR Communities) revealed the successful acquisition by Blackstone Real Estate Partners X for $39.12 per share in an all-cash deal. The transaction, valued at around $10 billion, encompasses the buyout of all outstanding common shares of AIR Communities and also involves taking on existing debt. The purchase was completed with the assistance of financial firms such as BofA Securities, Barclays, BMO Capital Markets Corp., and Deutsche Bank Securities.

Network Security Market to reach $58.42B by 2031, up from $19.92B in 2022, with 12.70% CAGR forecasted - SkyQuest Technology.
news.summary: In Westford, Massachusetts, as of June 28, 2024, SkyQuest has reported that the worldwide Network Security Market was worth USD 19.92 billion in 2022. The industry is expected to see an increase from USD 22.45 billion in 2023 to USD 58.42 billion by 2031, showcasing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 12.70% throughout the forecasted period.

news.headline: International Festival of Creativity, Cannes Lions, sees creators discussing AI and Metaverse at Joker Odyssey event series.
news.summary: The creative community at Partouche Club's Joker Odyssey event series grappled with the impact of new technology on their field.

news.headline: CO2 AI debuts solution to calculate product emissions at scale, aiding companies to lower environmental impact.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, in Paris, CO2 AI unveiled a groundbreaking technology that can accurately calculate carbon emissions for a wide range of products on a large scale. This innovation empowers businesses to strategize and implement measures to lower their carbon footprint. By utilizing this solution, companies can take significant steps towards achieving sustainability goals and making a positive impact on the environment. This development signifies a major milestone in the fight against climate change and reinforces the importance of adopting eco-friendly practices in various industries.

news.headline: Greystone Logistics approved $1 million stock repurchase program, to buy its common stock over 12 months.
news.summary: Greystone Logistics, Inc. headquartered in Tulsa, Oklahoma, disclosed on June 28, 2024, that its Board of Directors has given the green light to a stock repurchase initiative. Under this program, Greystone Logistics has the go-ahead to buy back $1 million worth of its common stock over a span of 12 months. The company is set to kickstart these repurchases in the second fiscal quarter of 2024.

news.headline: Google and TikTok ban Done Global's ads for ADHD medication after federal crackdown. DOJ charges 5 more individuals in the alleged conspiracy related to illegal distribution of Adderall.
news.summary: Google and TikTok have made the decision to ban Done Global from advertising on their platforms due to a federal crackdown on the telehealth company's distribution of Adderall and other stimulants. Adderall is primarily used to treat ADHD. The Justice Department has pressed charges against five more individuals linked to an alleged conspiracy at Done to unlawfully distribute Adderall and other controlled substances for treating ADHD. This action follows investigations by The Wall Street Journal and occurs nearly two years after Done lost a necessary third-party certification.

news.headline: Pro Music Rights, subsidiary of Music Licensing, Inc. (OTC: SONG), receives first payment from enforcement campaign, ensuring compliance.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Music Licensing, Inc. (OTC: SONG), the fifth public performance rights organization (PRO) in the US, based in Naples, FL, revealed that its subsidiary, Pro Music Rights, received its initial payment through a licensing enforcement initiative. This milestone kickstarts a drive to secure fair compensation and adherence for the utilization of its substantial music catalog.

Schneider Electric's dedication to sustainability and community impact has positioned them among the top companies in the country. news.headline: Ethereum devs explore Pectra upgrade, client variety, and block validation at Consensus Call #136 led by Alex Stokes.
news.summary: In the latest All Core Developers Consensus Call #136, led by Alex Stokes, Ethereum developers discussed key updates including the Pectra upgrade, client diversity, and block validation. The meeting centered around important aspects crucial for Ethereum's functioning. The developers highlighted the significance of these upgrades and processes in improving the overall efficiency and security of the Ethereum network. This call, attended by a significant number of developers, marked a step forward in the continued evolution of Ethereum, showcasing the community's commitment to driving advancements in blockchain technology.

news.headline: Supreme Court's recent decision eliminates Chevron Doctrine, jeopardizing federal rules on health care, safety, and environment.
news.summary: In 1984, a pivotal decision was made that mandated courts to uphold agencies' rational interpretations of unclear laws. This ruling has since served as the basis for numerous regulations concerning healthcare, safety, and environmental protection.

It is projected to reach USD 134.64 billion by 2031, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 16.60% expected during the forecast period.

This company is distinct as it is the sole resort, entertainment, and media entity with a focus on the influence of professional football.
